[D1] (4:14-4:26) TS377055: Avoid extending the native 'Error' class directly. Consider using a tagged error (e.g. Data.TaggedError) to maintain type safety in the Effect failure channel. effect(extendsNativeError)

  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"
